description: Use the SuiteCRM Module Builder to create and deploy a custom module for tracking delivery vehicles. Create a package named 'Fleet' (Key: 'FLT', Author: 'Admin') containing a 'Basic' type module named 'Vehicle' (Label: 'Vehicles'). The module must include three custom fields: 'vin_number' (TextField, Label: 'VIN Number'), 'license_plate' (TextField, Label: 'License Plate'), and 'payload_capacity' (Integer, Label: 'Payload Capacity'). Deploy the package to the live instance.
